creator: wellers@netvision.net.il
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	knewmail
#	knewmail/pkg
#	knewmail/pkg/COMMENT
#	knewmail/pkg/DESCR
#	knewmail/pkg/PLIST
#	knewmail/Makefile
#	knewmail/files
#	knewmail/files/md5
#
echo c - knewmail
mkdir -p knewmail > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - knewmail/pkg
mkdir -p knewmail/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - knewmail/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >knewmail/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-knewmail/pkg/COMMENT'
XA Mail notifier for the KDE enviorment.
END-of-knewmail/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - knewmail/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >knewmail/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-knewmail/pkg/DESCR'
XKNewMail is a KDE app designed to check your pop3 servers and/or local servers 
Xfor waiting mail, then return the headers of the mail. It is a small app that 
Xwill just sit in the panel and can either check the servers at preset intervals,
Xor only when forced. KNewMail will notify you by popup message, sound, and/or 
Xthe header list.
X
Xhttp://www.slac.com/mpilone/knewmail_home/
X
X- Tomer Weller
Xwellers@netvision.net.il
END-of-knewmail/pkg/DESCR
echo x - knewmail/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >knewmail/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-knewmail/pkg/PLIST'
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_active.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_bubble_query.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_bubble_swear.xpm

Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_mailbox_and_letter.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_1.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_2.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_3.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_4.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_6.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_5.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_7.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_8.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_panel_normal.xpm
Xshare/apps/knewmail/pics/knewmail_splash.xpm
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_1.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/index.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_2.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_3.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_4.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_5.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_6.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_7.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_8.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_9.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_10.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_11.html
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/3dletter.gif
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/backward.gif

Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/email.gif

Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/homepage.gif
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/index.gif
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/knewmail/knewmail_docs.gif
Xbin/knewmail
Xshare/icons/mini/knewmail.xpm
X@dirrm share/apps/knewmail/pics
X@dirrm share/apps/knewmail
X@dirrm share/doc/HTML/en/knewmail
X
X
X
X
X
X
X
X
END-of-knewmail/pkg/PLIST
echo x - knewmail/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >knewmail/Makefile << 'END-of-knewmail/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   KNewMail
X# Version required:    3.1
X# Date created:        6 June 1999
X# Whom:                Tomer Weller
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=      knewmail-3.1 
XCATEGORIES=    net kde 
XMASTER_SITES=  http://www.slac.com/mpilone/knewmail_home/downloads/
XEXTRACT_SUFX=  .src.tar.gz
X
XMAINTAINER=    wellers@netvision.net.il
X
XHAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
XKDEDIR=         ${PREFIX}
XLIB_DEPENDS=    kdecore.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11/kdelibs11
XUSE_QT=		yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS= --prefix=${PREFIX}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
X
END-of-knewmail/Makefile
echo c - knewmail/files
mkdir -p knewmail/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - knewmail/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >knewmail/files/md5 << 'END-of-knewmail/files/md5'
XMD5 (knewmail-3.1.src.tar.gz) = f48dc256a3c9ecb547df509aa28416e5
END-of-knewmail/files/md5
exit
